artPrompt: A clustered school of small three-eyed mutant bass fry hovering just beneath a toxic water surface, every milky third eye fixed slightly past the viewer in unsettling foreshortened close-up. Murky-green bodies catch sickly bioluminescent shafts filtering down past rusted submerged pipes; bruised stormy light wavers above the surface, eerie and watchful, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Three-Eyed Bass Fry
text:
Feed (Whenever a player rolls one or more dice, flips one or more coins, or votes, put a sludge counter on this creature.)
{2}{G}: Three-Eyed Bass Fry gets +1/+1 for each sludge counter on it until end of turn. It is, briefly, no longer a fry.
flavorText: A whole school of them this year. Each looking at you, and slightly past you.
